sections.instruction:
Complete the sentence below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
Complete the following form. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Complete the following sentence with THREE WORDS.
Choose the correct letter A-C.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.

questions.content: Mr. White is a personnel manager. Ms. Jones got to the interview {{BLANK}}
Ms Jones has a degree in {{BLANK}}

options: A her major would help her satisfy various interests
B she was not at first interested in the health field
C her parents helped her to select her major

questions.content: The headmistress will first tell her visitors about her kindergarten’s (11) {{BLANK}} and (12) {{BLANK}}. Maria Montessori is an (13) {{BLANK}}.
The headmistress says playing with toys and other things can help children to develop (14) {{BLANK}}. She says things like (15) {{BLANK}} and (16) {{BLANK}} should be seen as valuable resources.
On this map of school, A is the (17) {{BLANK}} and B is the (18) {{BLANK}}.

19. The headmistress says getting dirty in the garden is good for the children’s {{BLANK}}

B she needed to eat breakfast

questions.content: For a few weeks, Jill wants Harry and Bob to stop (26) {{BLANK}} and (27) {{BLANK}}. Jill wants the other two to (28) {{BLANK}} timetable as soon as she leaves them.

options: A the time for reviewing is limited
B when reviewing, it is best to take a five minute break every hour
C when reviewing, one should walk around once an hour
D reviewing separately is not a good idea
E Harry and Bob should question each other regularly while reviewing

sections.instruction:
Fill in the blanks on the following form. Use NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/ OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS for each answer.
Choose TWO letters A-E.

questions.content: Two types of facilities that are planned to be added in the second and third years after the school opens are (36) {{BLANK}} and (37) {{BLANK}}. And one of the most important facilities required by most parents is a (38) {{BLANK}}.
According to the talk which of the following are right?
options: A the club does not need a large golf practice range
B the range is close to the site of the proposed school
C the parents insist on no computer games
D the parents want a cafeteria selling fast food to save students’ time
E musical instruments are included in the budget
